code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Infra_RedisCache] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Infra_IngressController) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Infra_EtcdCluster) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Infra_IngressController) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Infra_RedisCache) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Infra_RedisCache) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Infra_EtcdCluster) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Infra_RedisCache) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Infra_WorkerNode) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个熔断器模式的状态图，主要用在webhook投递和外部服务调用的容错场景。核心状态有三个：Closed、Open和HalfOpen。
明白，这是典型的熔断器三态模型。我注意到您提到了webhook投递，那初始状态应该是Closed对吧？另外，状态迁移需要关联具体的infra组件吗，比如RedisCache作为初始触发点？
对的，初始状态是Closed，由Infra_RedisCache触发。关键迁移是：当Infra_IngressController的失败次数超过阈值时，Closed要转到Open。成功请求则由Infra_EtcdCluster维持Closed状态。
已添加Closed到Open的迁移，标注为Failure Threshold Exceeded，关联Infra_IngressController。同时添加了Closed的自循环：Successful Request走Infra_EtcdCluster，Failed Request走Infra_IngressController。
Open状态之后需要超时恢复机制。当Infra_RedisCache的超时时间到了，进入HalfOpen状态。HalfOpen比较特殊，它有三个迁移：测试成功回Closed（走Infra_EtcdCluster），测试失败回Open（走Infra_RedisCache），还有一个等待测试的自循环（走Infra_WorkerNode）。
确认一下HalfOpen的三条路径：Test Request Successful到Closed（Infra_EtcdCluster），Test Request Failed到Open（Infra_RedisCache），Waiting for Test自循环（Infra_WorkerNode）。Open本身也有个Request Attempted的自循环，对吗？
没错。另外三个状态都需要右侧注释说明行为：Closed要说明全量放行、监控失败率、追踪响应时间、递增错误计数器；Open要说明阻断请求、返回缓存或错误、记录日志；HalfOpen要说明限流测试、快速决策。
已完成所有状态迁移和右侧注释。Closed状态注释包含全量放行、监控失败率、追踪响应时间、递增错误计数器；Open状态注释包含阻断请求、返回缓存或错误、等待超时、记录日志；HalfOpen状态注释包含允许测试请求、限流、监控成功率、快速迁移决策。
